bugsletter.title: Asumi Bugsletter
bugsletter.description:
Hi 👋 You're invited to our mailing list! ✨

We send an email roughly once a month, including updates on Steam, new events, job offers and public demos!

If that sounds cool, sign up below 🦉 it will mean the world to us.
bugsletter.confirmationNotice: We'll send you a confirmation email.
bugsletter.ogDescription: Sign up for the Asumi mailing list to receive updates and news.

hero.headline: Infra without the headache

problem.title: We know the struggle
items: Setting up CI/CD, CRM, mailing list, and analytics individually
Each tool has its own account, billing, and dashboard
Without dedicated DevOps, infrastructure accumulates tech debt
SaaS platforms charge per seat, costs scale with your team

stack.title: See it in action
stack.subtitle: This is our own infrastructure. We eat our own cooking.
